entry.title: New: BFED-40 BILL 63 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
BILL 63 (2025), BILL 64 (2025), RESOLUTION 25-107, AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET ESTIMATED REVENUES; CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS AND APPENDIX C, DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT, WAILUKU-KAHULUI COMMUNITY PLAN AREA, GOVERNMENT FACILITIES, BOND FUND, ACQUISITION OF 105 NORTH MARKET STREET BUILDING AND PROPERTY (BFED-40)

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
